name: Upstage Solar LLM

seo.title: Upstage Solar LLM — AI API / SDK for Developers

when_to_use: Running Solar LLM for RAG and document QA in Korean and English

pros: Efficient small models punch above weight
cons: Document AI niche — not general purpose
review.verdict: Strong pick for Korean-market and document-heavy workloads where a small efficient LLM is enough.
review.best_for: Document AI and Korean-language apps wanting small, open LLMs with OpenAI-compatible API
review.not_for: Teams needing frontier reasoning or long-context English generation
